title: MikroTik EG25-G&KNe, KNOT Embedded LTE4, Global
description: The MikroTik KNOT Embedded LTE4 is a flexible industrial IoT gateway for asset tracking, remote monitoring, and efficient automation ( GPIO ) featuring eSIM support, LTE Cat. 4 , Bluetooth and GNSS . It is equipped with (1) 1Gbit PoE-In port This model is the global version with expanded LTE band support for North America and other markets outside the EMEA region and is certified by PTCRB and AT&T . The modem supports 4G LTE (Cat. 4) , 3G and 2G networks, with speeds of up to 150Mbps downlink and 50Mbps uplink . It utilizes 2x2 MIMO on the downlink (1) 1Gbit PoE-In port and (3) SMA female connectors for external antennas GPIO pins (digital/analog input / OD output) Support for eSIM , nano SIM and 2G/3G/4G LTE GNSS (BeiDou, Galileo, GPS, Glonass, QZSS) Bluetooth beacon tracking Flexible power options via USB-C (power only), active 802.3af/at PoE or passive 12-57V PoE Device Power adapter 5V/0.8A DIN rail mounting kit
